w:r.w:t: Farm to Future. Pure. Natural. Powerful.
Prepared for: Avasan Chakra Founders & Dev Team

Avasan Chakra is a farm-to-table food brand specialising in dehydrated vegetable powders, fruit powders, health nutrition blends, and ready-to-use culinary ingredients. The website must serve as a premium digital storefront that connects farmers, consumers, and B2B buyers in a seamless, trustworthy, and visually compelling experience.

Build India’s most trusted platform for natural dehydrated food products — rooted in farmer transparency, driven by nutrition science, and designed for modern Indian households and global export buyers.
Health-conscious individuals, homemakers, fitness enthusiasts, and urban cooks seeking natural alternatives
Food processors, restaurants, cloud kitchens, FMCG brands, nutraceutical companies, and exporters
Partner farmers whose produce data, stories, and certifications are showcased on the platform
Bulk buyers and regional distributors who need volume pricing and quote management
Unique, earthy-modern aesthetic: deep greens, warm naturals, clean whitespace
Full-screen hero video on homepage: farm footage, harvesting, and product processing
Farmer-first storytelling: every product traces back to a real farmer or region
Subscription-first mindset: recurring purchase model baked into UX from day one
Mobile-first responsive design: optimised for Indian smartphone users
The homepage is the flagship experience. It must immediately communicate trust, naturalness, and brand story through rich visuals and farmer data. Every scroll section must earn its place.
Autoplay, muted, looping 4K video: farm landscapes, harvesting, dehydration process, finished products
Bold headline: ‘From Our Farms to Your Kitchen’ with tagline and dual CTAs
‘Shop Products’ button — links to product catalogue
‘Our Farmers’ button — smooth-scrolls to Farmer Database section
High-quality full-screen image fallback for slow connections and mobile data saver mode
Animated arrow nudging users to scroll down
Compliant with browser autoplay policies: muted by default, user can unmute
This is the most unique section of the homepage — a real-time, scrollable showcase of partner farmers. This builds trust, differentiates the brand, and tells the origin story of every product.
Photo, name, village/district, state, years of association, crops grown, certifications held
Interactive India map with pin markers for each partner farm; clicking a pin opens farmer profile
Animated counters: Total Farms, States Covered, Acres Under Cultivation, Farmers Empowered
Users can filter farmer cards by crop type (e.g., show only tomato or drumstick farmers)
Short 2-line quote or story from each farmer in their own words
Badges: Organic Certified, FSSAI Approved, Export-Grade, No Pesticide
Shows current harvest season status for each farmer’s produce
‘Products from this Farm’ links to filtered product page showing that farmer’s products
Horizontally scrollable tabs: All, Vegetable Powders, Fruit Powders, Dehydrated, Health, B2B
Product image, name, weight options, price, ‘Add to Cart’, and subscription toggle
Editor’s Pick, Bestseller, New Arrival, and Seasonal tags on product cards
Click-to-expand modal with full product details without leaving homepage
Prominent ‘Explore All 60+ Products’ button at section end
6 icon cards: 100% Natural, Farm-Sourced, No Preservatives, FSSAI Certified, Export Quality, Eco Packed
Logo strip of all certifications and quality marks
3-step visual: Farm Harvest → Dehydration Process → Packed & Delivered
A dedicated homepage section driving users into subscription plans with a compelling value proposition.
‘Never Run Out. Subscribe & Save up to 20%’
3 plan cards (Starter, Family, Pro) with key highlights and monthly savings shown
‘Choose Your Plan’ button linking to full Subscription Plans page
Subscriber count: ‘2,400+ families subscribe monthly’ with star ratings
Visual recipe cards showing how to use products: Tomato Powder Pasta Sauce, Beetroot Smoothie Bowl, etc.
Short 30-second embedded recipe reels from Instagram or YouTube
Each recipe tags the Avasan Chakra products used, linking to product page
Community recipe submissions featured with user photo and handle
Scrolling carousel of verified buyer reviews with star ratings, photo, and product purchased
Logo strip of press mentions and media features
Tomato, Beetroot, Spinach, Onion, Curry Leaf
Onion Flakes, Garlic Flakes, Tomato Slices
Immunity Booster, Greens Mix, Protein Veg Mix
Soup Mix, Curry Base, Seasoning Blends
Live search with autocomplete across all 60+ products
Filter by: Category, Use Case, Dietary Need, Price Range, Weight, Certification, Farmer Origin
Sort by: Bestselling, Price Low-High, Newest, Rating, Alphabetical
Switch between card grid and detailed list view
Infinite scroll with skeleton loading states for fast perceived performance
Per-product toggle: One-time Purchase vs Subscribe & Save (shows % saving)
Multi-image slider with zoom, 360° view, and video tab showing product in use
Linked badge: ‘Sourced from Ravi Kumar’s farm, Vizianagaram’ — clicks to farmer profile
Structured table: Calories, Protein, Fibre, Vitamins, Minerals per 100g
Serving ideas, recipes, and usage quantity guide (e.g., ‘1 tsp per serving’)
Clearly displayed shelf life, storage conditions, and packaging info
Visual badge row: FSSAI, Organic, Export-Grade, Allergen-Free
Frequency selector (weekly/bi-weekly/monthly) with price calculator showing savings
Algorithmic ‘You may also like’ and ‘Often bought together’ sections
Verified buyer reviews with photo, rating, helpful votes, and admin response
Delivery availability and ETA checker by pincode

Subscriptions are a core revenue driver. The subscription system must be intuitive, flexible, and clearly communicate savings and convenience benefits to convert one-time buyers into recurring customers.
Weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly delivery cycles per product
Swap any product in your box up to 48 hours before dispatch
Pause for up to 3 months (travel, stock-up)
AI-predicted reorder based on usage patterns
Drag-and-drop interface to customise your monthly box
Shows cumulative savings vs one-time purchases since subscribing
SMS + email reminders 3 days before next billing cycle
Buy a 3/6/12-month subscription as a gift with personalised card
The Farmer Database is Avasan Chakra’s most distinctive feature — a full transparency layer showing exactly where products come from. This page is both a trust signal and a brand story.
Full name and high-quality farm photo
Village, Mandal, District, State, and GPS coordinates for map pin
Total acres under cultivation and crops currently grown
Year they joined the Avasan Chakra network
All Avasan Chakra products sourced from this farmer
Seasonal availability chart showing peak harvest months per crop
A personal quote or message from the farmer (in Telugu + English)
Internal quality rating updated each harvest batch
India map with farm location pins grouped by state; click pin to view farmer card
Search by name, crop, district, state, or certification type
Live counters: Farmers Onboarded, States, Crops, Acres, Batches Processed
Each product batch links to the specific farmer lot and harvest date
Monthly featured farmer with extended story and photo essay
Farmers can download their digital certification card as PDF
Secure portal for farmers to update harvest dates and stock availability
Dedicated B2B page with industrial-focused messaging and product specs
Structured form: company name, product, quantity (kg), delivery frequency, destination
Request 50g free samples of any product before bulk order
Certificate of Analysis, FSSAI licence, and export certificates downloadable per product
Automatic GST-compliant invoice generation for B2B orders
Order history, repeat order button, invoice download, and account manager contact
Customs-ready documents for international B2B buyers
Digital agreement signing for long-term supply contracts
Email, mobile OTP, Google SSO, and Apple ID sign-in
Name, address book, dietary preferences, and notification settings
Full order timeline with tracking, invoice, and reorder button
Manage all active subscriptions: swap, skip, pause, or cancel
Save products for later; shareable via link or WhatsApp
Green Points earned per purchase, redeemable on next order
‘Refer & Earn’ with unique referral code and cashback tracker
Optional health goal input (immunity, weight loss, fitness) for personalised product recs
Products purchased and reviewed; prompt to review unreviewd items
Cart saved across sessions and devices when logged in
Clear visual showing which items are one-time vs subscription
Coupon code input with real-time discount calculation
Multiple saved addresses with default selector
Date-based delivery slot booking (morning / afternoon / evening)
UPI (PhonePe, GPay, Paytm), Net Banking, Cards, COD, EMI, Wallets
Itemised summary with GST breakup before final payment
Real-time order confirmation via email, SMS, and WhatsApp
Delivery feasibility and ETA shown before checkout completion
SEO articles on sustainable eating, dehydrated food benefits, and Ayurvedic ingredients
300+ recipes tagged by product, occasion, dietary need, and cuisine
Expert-curated advice on integrating powders into daily cooking
How-to-use videos, farm tour vlogs, and product unboxing reels
Floating WhatsApp chat button with pre-filled message for quick orders
AI-powered chat bot with human escalation during business hours
English and Telugu language toggle across the website
Searchable FAQ covering products, delivery, subscriptions, and B2B queries
Self-service portal for returns, replacements, and account issues
Custom bundle creator: pick products, choose frequency, name your box
Side-by-side comparison of up to 3 products on nutrition, price, and usage
Shows cumulative environmental benefit of customer’s purchases
Web push for flash sales, harvest alerts, and subscription reminders
Welcome series, abandoned cart, re-engagement, and subscription renewal flows
Blogger and influencer affiliate tracking with commission dashboard
Add, edit, archive products; manage variants, pricing, and inventory
Onboard farmers, update certifications, manage harvest calendar
View, process, ship, and track all orders; generate bulk shipping labels
View all active subscribers, process renewals, handle pauses and cancellations
Receive, respond, and convert bulk quote requests into orders
Low-stock and out-of-stock alerts with reorder suggestions
Revenue, orders, top products, subscription churn, and farmer performance
CRM view of all customers with order history and segment tags
Create, schedule, and track promotional codes and discount campaigns
Edit homepage video, hero text, banners, blog posts, and recipe library
Next.js 14 (React) for SSR, SEO, and fast page loads
Node.js with Express or NestJS; REST + GraphQL APIs
AWS S3 or Cloudflare R2 for product images and farmer photos
Cloudflare Stream or Vimeo for hero video and recipe videos
NextAuth.js with Google, Apple, and OTP providers
Mapbox GL JS for interactive farmer map with custom markers
Google Analytics 4, Hotjar (heatmaps), and custom admin dashboard
Vercel (frontend), AWS EC2 or Railway (backend), Cloudflare CDN
Algolia or MeiliSearch for instant product and recipe search
Page load < 2.5 seconds on 4G; Core Web Vitals all green (LCP, FID, CLS)
Pixel-perfect on iOS Safari and Android Chrome; minimum 320px width support
SSR for all product and blog pages; structured data (Schema.org) for products and recipes
HTTPS everywhere, OWASP Top 10 compliance, PCI-DSS for payment flows
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance; keyboard navigation and screen reader support
99.9% availability SLA; automated health checks every 60 seconds
Architecture supports 10,000 concurrent users; horizontal scaling ready
PDPB (India) compliant; GDPR-ready for export market; cookie consent banner
/ — Homepage (Video Hero, Farmer Database, Products, Subscription Teaser, Recipes, Reviews)
Homepage, Product Catalogue, Cart, Checkout, Basic Auth
Farmer Database, Subscriptions, B2B Portal, Reviews
Recipe Library, Blog, Loyalty Points, Push Notifications
Bundle Builder, Comparison Tool, Affiliate, Export Module
All content is confidential and proprietary to Avasan Chakra.
